steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage's core claim is in sentence 2: “Researchers have gained insights about this system in ancient arthropods from traces found in various fossils.” The decisive signal is that fossils provide evidence for understanding prehistoric nervous systems.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: Fossil evidence can contribute to the understanding of the nervous system in ancient arthropods. directly expresses this: fossil evidence contributes to understanding ancient arthropod nervous systems. The other choices either misidentify the passage's scope or invent unsupported details. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
